hero.lede: A YouTube channel about Spanish food and the people who make it — original films, market visits, and recipes from all across Spain.

patreon.heading: Join us on Patreon
patreon.body: Early access to new episodes, behind-the-scenes notes from the road, and the occasional recipe you won't find anywhere else. Gracias.

social.description: Hosted by Oliver Guardo in Madrid, produced by Ben Derico. Full episodes on YouTube, behind-the-scenes on Instagram, early access on Patreon.
